## Agent Workflow

1. Before working in any workspace, read its own `AGENTS.md` first
2. Root-level changes (CI, shared config, root scripts) affect all workspaces
3. Never hardcode secrets — use environment variables
4. When changing shared code, check which workspaces depend on it
